info.title: Convoy API
info.description:
Convoy is a truck discovery and availability marketplace API.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a `user_id` (UUID) obtained from **POST /api/auth/verify-otp** after OTP login.

## Interactive docs
- **Swagger UI:** `/docs`
- **ReDoc:** `/redoc`
- **OpenAPI JSON:** `/openapi.json`

## Base path
All routes are served under **`/api`**.

post.description: Send OTP to mobile number
Verify OTP and login/register user
Update user's push notification token

get.description: Autosuggest locations: DB first (min 3 chars), then Google Places.

post.description: Send OTP to the mobile number linked with the Aadhaar.
Verify Aadhaar OTP via Cashfree and approve KYC on success.
Submit manual KYC with document images for admin review.
Add a truck for user
Verify vehicle registration via ULIP VAHAN proxy.
Verify driving license via ULIP SARATHI proxy.
Verify multiple documents in one request.
Create a truck availability post (stored as truck_route with PostGIS).
Reactivate an expired post
Search for available trucks using PostGIS ST_DWithin.
Track failed search for smart notifications
Log call button click for analytics
Post truck availability with PostGIS origin/destination.

get.description: PostGIS radius search for available trucks.

post.description: PostGIS radius search (JSON body).

get.description: Get a truck route listing by ID.

post.description: Book an available truck route.

parameters.name: user_id

schema.description: UUID of the user making the booking
schema.title: User Id

parameters.description: UUID of the user making the booking

post.description: Mark notification as read
Approve or reject KYC

get.description: Get list of available truck types

truck_route_id.title: Truck Route Id
truck_route_id.description: UUID of the truck route to book

aadhaarFrontImage.title: Aadhaarfrontimage
aadhaarFrontImage.description: Base64 or URL of Aadhaar front

aadhaarBackImage.title: Aadhaarbackimage
aadhaarBackImage.description: Base64 or URL of Aadhaar back
